_doc: Premix mask: ASNS specification codes whose nutritional requirement is assumed
to be satisfied by a fixed-rate vitamin/trace-mineral premix added to the feed.
When premix_enabled = true (default), constraints with these codes are SKIPPED
by the LP; everything else (macros, AAs, energy, Ca, P, fatty acids, toxins) stays.
FASA scientists can override per stage via the API by passing a custom mask;
the keys here are simply defaults sourced from common smallholder-feed-mill practice.
Toxins (TX*) are NEVER masked — they are hard ceilings driven by raw-ingredient

stage_overrides._doc: Optional: stage-specific mask additions/removals. Format: {<stage_label>: {add: [...], remove: [...]}}

Brood._doc: For brood stock, vitamin C is critical for egg quality and may be restored as a hard constraint.
